CS placements 2025-26
Laona
: Information Sir, The PMNAM (Prime Minister National Apprenticeship Mela) & Campus Placement will be held on 13 April 2026 at 10:00 AM at Government ITI, Ranjit Avenue, D-Block, Amritsar. The participating companies include:  1. Maruti Suzuki (Gurgaon)  2. Sonalika Tractors Ltd. (Hoshiarpur)  3. Bonn Bread (Ludhiana)  4. OCM (Amritsar)  5. Khanna Paper Mill (Amritsar)  6. Gujarat Gas Ltd.(Amritsar) You are requested to kindly forward this message to needy students so that they may attend the event. Please note that job opportunities will be offered subject to the terms and conditions of the respective companies. Salary/Stipend: ₹10,000 PM to ₹33,000 PM + other allowances/incentives. For more information, please contact: Sh. Vijay Kumar, TO(App) – 99141 88141 Sh. Narinderpal Singh, Jr. Assistant – 99153 79786 Note: It is informed to all that Government ITI Ranjit Avenue does not charge any fee for such activities. Sd/- (Er. Sanjeev Kumar Sharma) Principal Govt. ITI Ranjit Avenue, Amritsar

This is a light-wash denim crop top displayed on a white mannequin torso. Details: - Style: fitted bustier/corset shape with a sweetheart neckline - Straps: wide shoulder straps with ruffled/flounce trim - Front: vertical ruching/gathering down the center for a cinched look - Hem: slightly curved, cropped length - Fabric: denim, looks soft with a bit of stretch There's a brand tag attached on the right side (text isn't fully legible). A bright pink garment is partially visible next to it. Want styling ideas or info on where to find something similar?
